_comment: Repro record: V4 fix epsilon/expert decay mismatch
command_train: conda run --cwd /home/sun/phdproject/dqn/DQN6 -n ros2py310 python train.py --profile forest_a_all6_300_cuda_v4
command_infer: conda run --cwd /home/sun/phdproject/dqn/DQN6 -n ros2py310 python infer.py --profile forest_a_all6_300_cuda_v4

changes.amr_dqn/cli/train.py: Added --eps-decay CLI arg; pass to AgentConfig construction

rationale: V3 had eps_decay=2000 but only 300 episodes, so epsilon stayed ~0.51 at end of training (55% random actions). Expert decayed to 0% by ep 180 (decay=0.6), leaving 120 episodes with no expert and high random exploration. V4 aligns both schedules: epsilon reaches 0.01 by ep 250, expert reaches 0% by ep ~255, leaving 50 episodes of pure exploitation.
